positive: A whimsical cottagecore scene, featuring a group of forest animals (a fluffy fox, a curious bunny, and a gentle fawn) gathered around a miniature picnic basket. The setting is a deeply lush, overgrown woodland clearing bathed in soft, dappled sunlight. Include delicate elements like glowing fireflies, dew-covered mushrooms, and trailing ivy. Style: Storybook illustration, watercolor and ink sketch, high detail, fantasy art, Studio Ghibli inspired, warm pastel palette, volumetric lighting, highly detailed, trending on ArtStation, 8k quality, masterpiece.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, oversaturated, harsh lines, modern buildings
